scenario.name: Ask about office hours
scenario.goal: Confirm when the office is open and whether phones are answered during lunch.
end_when: Avery understands whether phones are answered at lunch.
details: Avery wants weekday and Saturday hours.
Avery may ask when the latest callback time is.

events.speaker: Agent
events.text: Call may be recorded for quality and training purposes.

events.speaker: Patient
events.text: Could you repeat that?

events.speaker: Agent
events.text: Of pretty good. AI. Am I speaking with Jordan

events.speaker: Patient
events.text: Could you repeat that?

events.speaker: Agent
events.text: Of course, this is Pivot Point Orthopedics.

events.speaker: Patient
events.text: Got it. I’m calling to check your office hours—what days are you open during the week and on Saturdays?

events.speaker: Agent
events.text: We're open Monday through Friday. The clinic is closed. On Saturdays. Would you like details about our weekday hours?

events.speaker: Patient
events.text: Yes, could you tell me the weekday hours and whether you’re open on Saturdays?

events.speaker: Agent
events.text: we're open Monday, Tuesday and Thursday, from 9:00 a.m. to 4:00 p.m. Wednesday from 12:00 p.m. to 7:00 p.m. and Friday from 9:00 a.m. to 12:00 p.m.

events.speaker: Patient
events.text: Thanks. Do you have Saturday hours, and are the phones answered during your lunch break?

events.speaker: Agent
events.text: Is there anything else you would like to? You're welcome. Let me know if you need anything else.

events.speaker: Patient
events.text: I still need to know—do you have Saturday hours, and are the phones answered during lunch?

events.speaker: Agent
events.text: We do not have Saturday hours, the clinic is closed on Saturdays.

events.speaker: Patient
events.text: And are the phones answered during your lunch break, or does the office close for lunch?

events.speaker: Agent
events.text: Regular business.

events.speaker: Patient
events.text: I’m sorry, just to be clear—does that mean phones are still answered during the lunch hour, or does the office close for lunch?

events.speaker: Agent
events.text: Question got cut off, no worries at all. Let me know if you have any other questions.

events.speaker: Patient
events.text: I appreciate that. Can you tell me if someone answers the phones during your lunch break, or if the office is closed for lunch?

events.speaker: Agent
events.text: The office stays open during lunch and phones are answered throughout regular business hours. If you call during those times, someone will be available to help.

events.speaker: Patient
events.text: Great, that answers everything. Thanks for your help.

events.speaker: Agent
events.text: Glad I could help have a great day.

events.speaker: Patient
events.text: Thanks, you too. Bye.

events.speaker: Patient
events.text: Sorry, I did not catch that. Could you say that again?
